user.title: Connect to SmartSlydr
user.description: Sign in with the SmartSlydr (LycheeThings) account you use in the mobile app.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SmartSlydr
reauth_confirm.description: The integration could not sign in to SmartSlydr with the stored credentials. Please re-enter the password for {username}.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the SmartSlydr API.

abort.already_configured: This SmartSlydr account is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the SmartSlydr API. Range: 10–3600 seconds.
data_description.base_url: Override only if SmartSlydr publishes a new endpoint or you need a local proxy.

upstream_unexpected_response.title: SmartSlydr backend returned an unexpected response
upstream_unexpected_response.description: The SmartSlydr API returned a payload the integration didn't recognize. This is usually a server-side issue with the LycheeThings backend, not your account or your Home Assistant setup. The integration will recover automatically once the API is restored. If the LycheeThings mobile app can also no longer see your devices, please report the outage to SmartSlydr support.

confirm.title: Retry SmartSlydr connection
confirm.description: Click Submit to ask the integration to retry the SmartSlydr API now. If the backend is reachable, this notice will clear automatically.

confirm_with_reset.title: Retry SmartSlydr connection

upstream_unavailable.title: SmartSlydr backend is unreachable
upstream_unavailable.description: The integration could not contact the SmartSlydr API after several retries. Check your internet connection and the AWS service health. Your devices will appear unavailable until the connection is restored; the integration will reconnect automatically.

confirm.title: Retry SmartSlydr connection
confirm.description: Click Submit to ask the integration to retry the SmartSlydr API now. If the backend is reachable, this notice will clear automatically.

confirm_with_reset.title: Retry SmartSlydr connection

recalibrate_cover.name: Recalibrate cover move duration
recalibrate_cover.description: Clear the auto-calibrated move duration for one or more SmartSlydr cover entities. The next full open or close traversal will measure a new duration. Manual overrides set in the integration's options are preserved.
